fit: P1 sweet-spot — EX onboarding program management is Jamie's strongest match. Real overlap: onboarding redesign (Vestas across 3 global locations; InGenius -75% time, 70+ staff), program management (20+ programs, 10+ vendors), measure-impact-not-participation (NextGen 2,000+ analysis -> manager-effectiveness driver -> C-suite), cross-functional partnership, AI-as-daily-collaborator.
